name: agroinsight
description: AgroInsight — National Agricultural Assessment Platform (Full Stack)

scripts.setup: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='backend/.env';const e='backend/.env.example';if(!fs.existsSync(p)&&fs.existsSync(e)){fs.copyFileSync(e,p);console.log('Created backend/.env from .env.example')}" && cd backend && npm install && echo 'Setup complete. Edit backend/.env then run: npm run dev'
